document.title: Retiring or Separating: How to Prepare — UNJSPF Video
document.revision: UNJSPF Video: Retiring or Separating - How to Prepare

chunks.part: Retiring or Separating — How to Prepare
chunks.heading: What is the first step in preparing to separate from service?
chunks.text: Start by understanding your benefit options on the fund's website, using resources such as comparison charts, booklets, or the benefit options video.

chunks.part: Retiring or Separating — How to Prepare
chunks.heading: What should I do to access my pension statements, forms, and estimates?
chunks.text: Register for Member Self-Service (MSS) to access annual pension statements, forms, and pension estimates.

chunks.part: Retiring or Separating — How to Prepare
chunks.heading: How do I check that my personal data and contributions are correct before separating?
chunks.text: Check your most recent annual pension statement (issued at the end of May) under the 'Documents' tab in MSS to ensure all personal data and contributions are correct. Contact your Human Resources office if corrections are needed.

chunks.part: Retiring or Separating — How to Prepare
chunks.heading: How do I understand my benefit options and amounts before separating?
chunks.text: Run a pension estimate in your MSS account to understand your benefit options and amounts based on your intended separation date.

chunks.part: Retiring or Separating — How to Prepare
chunks.heading: How do I indicate my preferred benefit choice?
chunks.text: Complete the payment instructions form to indicate your preferred benefit (e.g., withdrawal settlement or retirement benefit, with or without a lump sum). You may also choose to defer payment for up to 36 months.

chunks.part: Retiring or Separating — How to Prepare
chunks.heading: What should I do close to my separation date, and how do I track whether the Fund has received my documents?
chunks.text: Contact your HR office 2-3 months before separation to follow organizational procedures. The fund processes payments once all documents are received; you can track their receipt in the MSS 'Proof Documents' tab. Visit unjspf.org for more information.
